title: Fireflies GUI
description: A easily-editable prettification of Minecraft's GUI, making things a little softer and more colorful.
body:
A prettification of Minecraft's GUI. Seeks to make the GUI a bit brighter and more colorful.
- Adds colored shading to inventory/containers, the hotbar, and menu widgets to make them pop
- Adds colored outlines to hearts and bubbles
- Prettifies all heart variants with new shading
- Replaces the armor bar with shields instead of chestplates (I find the chestplate ones ugly)
- Replaces the hunger bar with melons (glistering melons when the hunger effect is applied). This is my favorite change of mine because not only is an actual melon slice worth 1 hunger melon but the inedible glistering melons make for the perfect hunger effect.
- Makes mount health actually saddle shaped (it's supposed to be saddles. did you know that? sure doesn't look like it)
- Changes the inventory armor slots to resemble the game's armor (ex. hat slot shaped like a minecraft helmet instead of... a face)
- Adds little dots to the crosshair so it sparkles :)

All of these changes are editable/removable to your tastes just by going into the resource pack files. Delete whatever you don't like and it'll be gone! I promise, even if you're not familiar with the file structures and such you can do it.

If you find any issues (aside from weirdly red heart outlines in rare contexts, not sure what's going on there) message me on discord @tegzi
